TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sikihiki ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 205 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 190 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 76%, Amis 10%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sikihiki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sikihiki hya' ga Siulang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sikihiki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕikiħiki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiulaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕikiħiki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sikihiki ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 205 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 190 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 76%, Amis 10%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sikihiki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sikihiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sikihiki hya' ga Siulang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sikihiki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕikiħiki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕikiħiki ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiulaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕikiħiki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
